data.title: 2025 CIFTIS in Beijing sees participation from nearly 500 Fortune Global 500 companies, boosting global trade in services.
data.description: On September 10, 2025, the 2025 China International Fair for Trade in Services (CIFTIS) commenced in Beijing with the theme of "Embrace Intelligent Technologies, Empower Trade in Services." The event garnered attention as it brought together around 500 Fortune Global 500 companies.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics found success distributing SIL204 to key pancreatic cancer metastatic sites, reducing tumor burden.
data.description: Recent preclinical studies have shown promising results with the successful distribution of a new drug to the liver, peritoneum, and lung. At clinically relevant doses, there were measurable reductions in tumor burden. This provides hope for potential treatment options with significant impact on combatting cancer. These findings mark a significant breakthrough in the field of oncology research.

data.title: Goldman Sachs anticipates August CPI inflation to surpass estimates, with a 0.37% rise in headline CPI and a 0.36% increase in core CPI.
data.description: Economists at Goldman Sachs Group Inc. anticipate that the upcoming release of August's Consumer Price Index inflation report will reveal a significant increase. They predict a 0.37% rise in the headline CPI, exceeding the consensus of +0.3%, driven by higher food prices at +0.35% and energy prices at +0.6%. This would result in a year-over-year inflation rate of 2.9%. Core CPI, which excludes volatile food and energy costs, is also expected to surpass the consensus, with an anticipated 0.36% increase in August, leading to a year-over-year rate of 3.13%, above the +3.1% consensus. The analysts expect these inflation figures to be influenced by rising costs in various sectors, including travel and those impacted by new tariffs.

data.title: Gold prices surge with "classic stagflationary behavior," nearing $3,700/oz mark. Gold mining stocks outperform S&P 500 sectors, reflecting investor concerns on inflation and economic growth stagnation. Analysts see parallels with 1970s dynamics.
data.description: Gold and gold mining stocks are outperforming the market due to increased investor concern over inflation and weakening economic growth. The price of gold is near $3,700 per ounce, and the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (NYSE: GDX) is leading the S&P 500 sectors year-to-date. This surge is likened to the stagflationary behavior of the 1970s, where hard assets outperform financial assets in times of sticky inflation and stalled growth. Analysts attribute this paradigm shift to gold becoming an ultimate stagflation hedge, as equities and bonds struggle with margin pressures and inflation. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Small-cap stocks show potential rally as earnings accelerate, valuations remain attractive, and market anticipates rate cuts. Small-cap EPS growth surged by 12.1% in Q2, projected to outpace large caps until 2026. Share of unprofitable small-cap names is declining.
data.description: Small-cap stocks are showing a bullish signal for a potential rally as earnings accelerate, valuations are appealing, and the market expects significant interest rate cuts. Data from LSEG, Bloomberg, and Barclays Research, shared by @WallStJesus, indicates a shift challenging mega-cap stock dominance. Small-cap forward earnings growth has risen by 3.7% year-to-date, and EPS growth is projected to surpass large caps (excluding tech) until 2026, as per a tweet on September 11, 2025. In Q2, small-cap EPS growth surged by 12.1% YoY despite a 5.0% sales drop, showcasing strong operating leverage. The percentage of unprofitable small-cap firms is decreasing. The full story is found on Benzinga.com.

The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 53.70, indicating a neutral position. AAVE seems to be in a consolidation phase, with investors closely monitoring its movements.

data.title: Schneider Electric introduces new products for electrical contractors at NECA 2025, discusses 2026 NEC code changes.
data.description: Introducing a range of innovative products designed specifically for electrical contractors to address the rapidly changing demands of the sector. Additionally, providing expert analysis on the implications of the revised 2026 NEC code on electrical contractors, including insights on how it will affect their operations and financial performance. This announcement was made in Chicago on September 13, 2025.

data.title: Acrylic Resins market to reach $28.55 billion by 2030 per report by MarketsandMarkets™.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 13, 2025, a report on the global Acrylic Resins Market was released. The report covers various aspects such as chemistry, property, solvency, application, end-use industries including Building & Construction, Industrial, Paper & Paperboard, Consumer Goods, Electrical & Electronics, and Packaging, across different regions. This comprehensive analysis provides insights into the sector's trends and forecasts.

data.title: Battery Electrolyte Market to reach $27.99 billion by 2030; report covers lead-acid, lithium-ion batteries and various electrolyte types.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on September 13, 2025, a report on the Battery Electrolyte Market was released. The report covers various aspects such as Battery Type including Lead-Acid and Lithium-Ion, Electrolyte Type such as Liquid, Gel, and Solid, End Uses like EV, Consumer Electronics, Energy Storage, Materials used such as Sulfuric Acid, Lithium Salts, Solvents, and different regions. This comprehensive report provides insights into the market trends and forecasts for the future. The data offers valuable information for industries involved in battery production and technology.
